chapter_title.ar: باب الْجُنُبِ يَعْرَقُ فِي الثَّوْبِ أَوْ يُصِيبُ جَسَدُهُ ثَوْبَهُ وَ هُوَ رَطْبٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 34 – The one with sexual impurity sweats in the clothes, or his body touches his clothes and he is wet

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/154)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/154)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الرَّجُلُ يَبُولُ وَ هُوَ جُنُبٌ ثُمَّ يَسْتَنْجِي فَيُصِيبُ ثَوْبُهُ جَسَدَهُ وَ هُوَ رَطْبٌ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Muawiya Bin Ammar who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The man urinates and he is with sexual impurity. Then he cleans his private part, and his clothes hit his body and he is wet’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who urinates while he has experienced sexual relation. He then cleanses himself and his clothes touch his body while it is wet. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not harmful.’”
